title: acrosanthes anceps
intro: Acrosanthes anceps, also known as the twin-flowered Acrosanthes or twin-stemmed Acrosanthes, is a plant species belonging to the family Malpighiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions. Acrosanthes anceps is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal remedies, such as tinctures and decoctions.
